zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke是Edmund Yorke和Katherine Robins的女兒，於1583年6月14日在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓 哥吉拉 沙智受洗。她於1603年4月25日與Governor Thomas Dudley在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1630年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆。她去世於1643年12月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年60歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke是Edmund Yorke和Katherine Robins的女儿，于1583年6月14日在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓 哥吉拉 沙智受洗。她于1603年4月25日与Governor Thomas Dudley在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1630年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆。她去世于1643年12月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年60岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

variants.name: York
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke was christened on 14 June 1583, in Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Edmund Yorke and Katherine Robins. She married Governor Thomas Dudley on 25 April 1603, in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She immigrated to Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1630. She died on 27 December 1643, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke a été baptisée le 14 juin 1583, à Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille d’Edmund Yorke et Katherine Robins. Elle a épousé Governor Thomas Dudley le 25 avril 1603, à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle a immigré au Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1630. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1643, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke wurde am 14. Juni 1583 in Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Edmund Yorke und Katherine Robins getauft. Sie hat am 25. April 1603 in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England Governor Thomas Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie ist 1630 nach Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Sie starb am 27. Dezember 1643 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke è stato battezzato il 14 giugno 1583 nel Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Edmund Yorke e Katherine Robins. Lei sposato Governor Thomas Dudley il 25 aprile 1603, nel Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Immigrata nel Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1630. Morì il 27 dicembre 1643, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorkeは1583年6月14日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトン アル サインツでEdmund YorkeとKatherine Robinsの娘として洗礼を受けた。1603年4月25日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンでGovernor Thomas Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムに移住した。彼女は1643年12月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで60歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke(은)는 1583년 6월 14일 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴 앨 세인츠에서 Edmund Yorke(와)과 Katherine Robins의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1603년 4월 25일 영국 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에서 Governor Thomas Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1630년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1643년 12월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke foi batizada em 14 de junho de 1583, em Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Edmund Yorke e Katherine Robins. Ela casou-se com Governor Thomas Dudley em 25 de abril de 1603, em Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1630. Ela faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1643, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke была крещена 14 июня 1583 г. в местности нортамптон алл сеинц, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Edmund Yorke и Katherine Robins. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Governor Thomas Dudley 25 апреля 1603 г. в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она иммигрировала в сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1630 году. Она умерла 27 декабря 1643 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Dorothy Yorke se bautizó el 14 de junio de 1583, en Northampton All Saints, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de Edmund Yorke y Katherine Robins. Se casó con Governor Thomas Dudley el 25 de abril de 1603, en Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Inmigró a Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1630. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1643, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
